title: helichrysum nanum
intro: Helichrysum nanum, also known as the small yellow curry or tiny curry plant, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and injuries. The health benefits of Helichrysum nanum include reducing inflammation, promoting skin health, and aiding in the recovery from physical trauma. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
